title: 书签列表
completionRule: Complete only when the bookmark virtual source uses the same source-evidenced file item renderers and thumbnail semantics as the folder Card, preserves list management and file actions, and has bounded GUI/CLI/TUI lifecycle and performance evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 共享文件浏览器外观与条目 renderer
acceptanceItems: 列表/内容/横幅/缩略图视觉语义
窄 Card 响应式密度

sourceUiInventory.title: 书签列表切换与管理
acceptanceItems: 删除列表后移除成员关系

sourceUiInventory.title: 状态、持久化与生命周期
acceptanceItems: Card 折叠零缩略图工作

sourceUiInventory.title: Bookmark Panel 与无标题 full-height Card shell
书签虚拟源工具栏与清理
搜索、八字段排序与类型筛选
四种文件视图与尺寸设置
可见缩略图与文件夹多图预览
文件条目字段、徽章与状态
多选、链选与批量操作栏
批量添加到书签列表对话框
书签业务数据与视图设置持久化
可访问性、响应式与视觉 characterization
acceptanceItems: 缩略图不重挂 Reader 图像

items.title: 复用文件浏览器条目视觉契约
items.targetContract: Bookmark rows use a shared folder-entry visual primitive for compact/rich list and thumbnail surfaces instead of a divergent icon-only list.
items.notes: The default Bookmark content row now uses the shared React Folder entry surface with the authenticated visible-window thumbnail leaf. Bookmark-specific compact/banner/thumbnail switching and migration of Folder's local renderers to the primitive remain pending.

items.title: 显示可见书签缩略图
items.targetContract: Only the virtual visible bookmark window registers authenticated file/folder thumbnails; stale batches cancel and contexts release on list change or unmount.
items.notes: The visible virtual window now registers authenticated cover thumbnails and releases its owner; full folder-mode and invalid-path parity remain pending.

items.title: 切换系统与自定义书签列表
items.targetContract: All, default, favorites and custom lists remain distinguishable and the active list filters the virtual source.
items.notes: React now preserves the legacy horizontal chip hierarchy; active-list persistence and the full management surface remain incomplete.

items.title: 创建、重命名、收藏与删除列表
items.targetContract: Custom lists support create, rename, favorite and delete with protected system lists and membership cleanup.
items.notes: GUI uses controlled dialogs for create/rename/favorite/delete, system lists stay protected, and all mutations reuse the shared service used by CLI/TUI.

items.title: 虚拟化大书签列表
items.targetContract: List rendering, pagination and thumbnail demand remain bounded by the visible window at 10K items.
items.notes: Rows and thumbnail registration are bounded by the virtual window; the dedicated 10K Chromium request-count corpus remains pending.

items.title: 共享选择与焦点语义
items.targetContract: Single, toggle, range and keyboard focus selection match the folder Card without materializing unbounded DOM.
items.notes: Stable bookmark IDs back single, Ctrl/Meta toggle and Shift range selection; Arrow/Home/End move visible focus, Space selects and Enter opens without adding DOM rows.

items.title: 打开、定位、收藏与移除书签
items.targetContract: Single bookmark actions preserve legacy file commands and authenticated host capabilities.
items.notes: Single/double-click and explicit open, star, single remove and confirmed batch remove exist; copy, reveal, system-open, rename, tags and new-tab actions remain pending.

items.title: 批量编辑书签与列表成员关系
items.targetContract: Selected bookmarks can be added to multiple lists or removed through one bounded operation.
items.notes: GUI sends one bounded authenticated request for multi-list membership and one for confirmed delete; explicit CLI/TUI batch commands remain pending.

items.title: GUI/CLI/TUI 共用书签契约
items.targetContract: All surfaces share canonical source identity, list membership, favorite state and timestamps without a second bookmark store.
items.notes: Core persistence is shared; remaining UI commands must use it.

items.title: 加载、空、错误、刷新与失效路径
items.targetContract: Stable loading, empty, request error, action error, retry and invalid-path states retain existing rows when optional thumbnails fail.

items.title: 持久化列表、活动筛选与 Card 布局
items.targetContract: Bookmark business data remains in the compatible NeoView database while Card layout uses canonical [nodes.neoview].
items.notes: Active-list persistence and legacy import still require evidence.

items.title: 取消分页和缩略图并释放上下文
items.targetContract: List switches, collapse, unmount and backend disposal abort stale loads and release thumbnail contexts.
items.notes: Visible batches abort and release on replacement/unmount, while real Chromium covers list switches; backend disposal and collapsed request-count evidence remain pending.

items.title: 保持共享 Card shell 行为
items.targetContract: Bookmark remains independently lazy, hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable.
items.notes: The shared shell and independent 11,399-byte Bookmark plus 1,969-byte entry-surface deferred production chunks are gated in desktop and constrained Card flows.

items.title: 键盘选择、命名动作与焦点恢复
items.targetContract: List tabs, rows, selection, menus and destructive confirmations are keyboard/touch operable with stable accessible names.
items.notes: Row actions are named; selection and context actions remain incomplete.

items.title: 保持旧版文件条目信息密度
items.targetContract: Folder-style thumbnails, title/path hierarchy, action density and selection states fit desktop and 420x360 Cards without overlap.
items.notes: Desktop and 420x360 Chromium capture both the folder-style thumbnail hierarchy and selected-row action density without overflow.

items.title: 有界 DOM、可见缩略图与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: The Card renders a bounded virtual window, registers only visible thumbnails, performs zero hidden work and stays in an independent deferred chunk.
items.notes: Visible registration and the deferred chunk are gated; a 10K Chromium request-count run and explicit collapsed-state proof remain pending.

items.title: 缩略图工作不重挂活动阅读图像
items.targetContract: Opening the Card, scrolling thumbnails and switching lists preserve the active Reader media node and asset URL.
items.notes: Real Chromium proves opening and thumbnail mutation preserve the active image; scrolling and list-switch identity checks remain pending.

items.title: 记录共享后端与视觉 primitive 扩展
items.targetContract: Document authenticated thumbnail batching and the shared React entry visual as XR implementations of the legacy FileListPanel reuse contract.
items.notes: Authenticated visible-window thumbnails, stable ID selection, bounded batch routes and the shared slot-based entry surface replace the legacy in-process FileListPanel wiring without removing bookmark fields or creating a second business store.
